task_completion.description: Create a Training Routine named 'Hotel Gym Full Body'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger interface shows a training routine with the exact title 'Hotel Gym Full Body'.

task_completion.description: Create a Training Day named 'Full Body Circuit'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Hotel Gym Full Body' routine, there is a training day titled 'Full Body Circuit'.

task_completion.description: Add exactly 5 distinct exercises to the training day
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Full Body Circuit' training day, there is a list of exactly 5 different exercises.

task_completion.description: All exercises must require ONLY 'Dumbbell' or 'Cable' equipment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment icons or text labels for all 5 exercises indicate they use either Dumbbells or Cables. No barbells, machines, kettlebells, or bodyweight-only exercises should be present.

task_completion.description: At least one 'Dumbbell' and at least one 'Cable' exercise is included
task_completion.visual_evidence: Among the 5 exercises, there is visual confirmation of at least one exercise using Dumbbells and at least one exercise using Cables.

task_completion.description: Configure each exercise for 3 sets of 12 repetitions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Next to or below each of the 5 exercises, the set and repetition configuration shows '3' sets and '12' reps (e.g., '3 x 12' or similar UI representation).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the wger web interface via a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the wger fitness manager at http://localhost, rather than terminal curl commands or python API scripts.

integrity.description: The routine is actually saved in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the saved routine overview or dashboard, not just text typed into an unsaved form or a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the page content
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are not open and actively being used to alter the DOM text to match the required routine details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values: Routine Name must be 'Hotel Gym Full Body'. Day Name must be 'Full Body Circuit'. There must be exactly 5 distinct exercises. Allowed equipment is strictly 'Dumbbell' and 'Cable' (both must be represented at least once). Forbidden equipment includes barbell, sz-bar, machine, kettlebell, gym mat, none, and none (bodyweight). Every exercise must be configured for exactly 3 sets and 12 reps.
